title: Fix the Inefficient String Palindromes Finder

statement.markdown: Given a string `s`, write a function that finds all substrings which are palindromes. The function should return a list of these palindromic substrings. Note that these substrings can be of length 1 or more. For example, if the input string is "racecar" the function should return ["a", "racecar", "cec"], as these are the palindromic substrings of the input string.
statement.inputFormat: A single string `s` of alphanumeric characters
statement.outputFormat: An array of strings where each string is a palindromic substring of the input string
statement.notes: The function should not return any duplicates and the order of the palindromic substrings does not matter

examples.explanation: These are the palindromic substrings of the input string
These are the palindromic substrings of the input string

hints.text: Use a nested loop to generate all substrings of the input string
